name: Broccoli's Answer to Potato Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut broccoli into bite-sized florets.
2. Steam the broccoli until it is crisp-tender.
3. Place the cooked broccoli in a large bowl.
4. Add cubed hard-boiled eggs to the bowl.
5. Slice celery on the thin side; cut the wide end of the stalks and then slice.
6. Slice green onions, including both the whites and the firm first few inches of the green part (the kind stuffed with pimiento). You can also use pre-chopped green salad olives; drain them.
7. To make the dressing, combine mayonnaise, sour cream, and/or yogurt according to taste. Mix until it is thin enough to serve as a dressing; if needed, add milk or lemon juice for consistency.
8. Toss together the vegetables and the dressing in the bowl.
9. Refrigerate until serving time. Enjoy fresh immediately after preparation as the crisp texture may diminish over time.
